trend_signal: Remote work hybrid models and digital nomad lifestyle growth
stock_safe_concept: Minimalist home office with laptop, ergonomic chair, potted plants, and natural light
buyer_use_cases: Website hero images for productivity tools
Blog posts about remote work tips
risk_notes: No identifiable faces, no visible brand logos on devices or furniture
score_reason: Highly relevant to ongoing remote work trends, broad appeal across multiple commercial sectors, minimal risk of copyright or editorial issues.

stock_safe_concept: Flat lay of reusable household items like bamboo toothbrush, metal straws, cloth bags, and glass jars on natural fabric background
buyer_use_cases: Educational content on reducing plastic waste
Sustainability blogs and social media posts
risk_notes: No branded packaging or logos, generic product designs only
score_reason: Strong alignment with growing eco-friendly consumer movement, versatile use cases, low risk if products are generic.

trend_signal: Health and wellness focus with home fitness rise
stock_safe_concept: Serene yoga mat setup with cushions, candles, small indoor plants, and a water bottle in a cozy living room corner
risk_notes: No people or faces, no branded items on props
score_reason: Well-targeted to booming wellness industry, calming visuals with broad commercial appeal, safe from copyright or editorial complications.

trend_signal: Rise of plant-based diets and healthy eating habits
stock_safe_concept: Top view of a vibrant bowl with quinoa, roasted vegetables, avocado slices, and leafy greens on a rustic table
risk_notes: No visible branded ingredients or packaging, no copyrighted dish presentations
score_reason: Highly popular dietary trend, colorful and appealing imagery suitable for multiple buyers, low risk when ingredients are generic.

stock_safe_concept: Close-up of a hand interacting with a generic smart home touchscreen panel controlling lights and temperature
risk_notes: No real brand logos on device, UI must be original and free from trademarked icons
score_reason: Growing smart home market relevance, good commercial use potential, moderate risk mitigated by generic UI design.
